narrative:
West Geauga Local Sd (Geauga) school district has 16,673 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.1 percentage points.
